title: murdannia ochracea
intro: Murdannia ochracea, also known as Yellow Flag or Yellow Flag Lilyturf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Murdannia ochracea include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
